name: chapter close: early resolved spine promotes active current thread missing from runtime

source.purpose: Regression from 260430 Playthrough SO Pursuit: Archivist-created active threads can exist in campaign.threads without chapter.setup.activeThreadIds/loadBearingThreadIds. Early resolved spine should promote the best live current-chapter pressure instead of staying stuck on successorRequired.
